title: teutliopsis hastata
intro: Teutliopsis hastata, also known as "teutliopsis," is a type of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, native to Central America and Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Teutliopsis hastata has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
